title: thapsia villosa subsp. minor
intro: Thapsia villosa subsp. minor is a plant species, also known as Lesser Thapsia or African Poisonous Thorn, which belongs to the family Apiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Thapsia villosa subsp. minor include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to use caution and consult with a medical professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
